entry.title: New: CR 25-61 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 113 (2025), to: 1) allow property owners who miss the December 31 deadline for the home or long-term rental exemption to file for a partial exemption by September 30 of the tax year, subject to a penalty; and 2) clarify the January 1 effective date for the home exemption.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
